title: lithospermum petraeum
intro: Lithospermum petraeum, also known as alpine gromwell, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae), native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Lithospermum petraeum include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. Lithospermum petraeum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption require further scientific research.
